description: Set up environment: install dependencies, create .gitignore with .env entry, create .env.example and .env files with EUR-Lex credentials, add python-dotenv to requirements.txt, and verify existing tests pass.
steps: Add python-dotenv>=1.0.0 and zeep>=4.2.0 (SOAP client library) to scripts/requirements.txt. Keep existing dependencies.
Create .env.example in project root with placeholder variables: EURLEX_USERNAME=your_username_here and EURLEX_PASSWORD=your_password_here
Create .env in project root with actual credentials: EURLEX_USERNAME=tomaszkrawczyk and EURLEX_PASSWORD=3iDIZdYIrxm
Create .gitignore in project root with entries: .env, __pycache__/, *.pyc, .pytest_cache/, output/
Run pip install -r scripts/requirements.txt to install all dependencies
Run python -m pytest scripts/tests/ -v to confirm existing tests still pass
acceptance_criteria: .env.example exists with EURLEX_USERNAME and EURLEX_PASSWORD placeholders
verification: python -c "from dotenv import load_dotenv; print('dotenv OK')"
